executionArgs.additionalInstruction: The app runs at http://127.0.0.1:8765. Login credentials: email=fabio@example.com, password=password. The sidebar has a user avatar/menu for logout. Settings are at /settings/profile, /settings/password, /settings/appearance. The dashboard post form is a textarea with a Submit button. The My Posts filter is an anchor link /dashboard?my-posts=true.
